content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat around 24,020 with mixed sector action — Pharma (+2.26%) and Auto (+0.49%) leading; Energy (-0.67%) lagging. VIX at 17.81 still elevated. Q4 earnings season driving big single-stock moves (COFORGE +11%, M&M +4.8%, CAMS +10%, TITAGARH +9.5%). Book is broadly green and well-deployed at 67%; focus on managing existing positions rather than aggressive new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.1%. Current SL 1030 is already above entry 984 (locks in ~4.7%). CMP 1045.60. Trailing SL further (e.g., to 1035) would put it ~1% below CMP — within the 1% trail-gap floor mandate, so leaving SL at 1030 (gap ~1.5%). Strong Q4 print (PAT +18%, GNPA <1%, dividend Rs 8). Holding to target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.0%, CMP 124.05 recovering today (+1.36%) on weaker dollar. SL 119 (-4.9% from entry) intact. Defensive hedge against geopolitical tail. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4%, hit ATH 1751 today before fading to 1727.70. Existing SL 1710 already at breakeven+10. Tightening more would breach 1% trail-gap (CMP 1727.70 → 1% below = 1710.4). Keeping SL 1710 (gap 1.0%). Investor roadshow May 6-12 — modest event risk. Holding target 1800."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.6%, CMP 206.48, SL 206 — VERY close to SL. CMP touched 206.00 intraday low. Thesis (Q4 PAT +68%, NIM 6.2%) intact; banking sector positive today. SL is the discipline — let it work. If stopped, accept the loss. Not loosening SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.3%, defence momentum strong. CMP 4635, SL 4600 already at breakeven+25 (gap ~0.75% — tight but acceptable given prior tick). Q4 board meeting May 14 — catalyst within 5 sessions but more than 3, so not yet binary-window. Holding to target 4875. No change to stored levels — keeping HOLD essentially via no-op verification; emitting MODIFY as confirmation only if values changed. Actually values match stored — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%, CMP 7022, SL 6960 (gap ~0.9% — at the 1% trail-gap floor; not tightening further to avoid forced exit). Q4 PAT +114%, FY26 EBITDA margin 34.3%, Geojit TP 8500. Strong fundamentals. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%, CMP 842.45 after gapping up 9.5%. SL 825 (-1.5% from entry). Q4 results pending — binary risk within window. Volume signature (9.5% of equity) suggests block activity. Holding tight; if Q4 disappoints SL absorbs the move."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8% but stock +6.1% today on Q4 print (PAT +30%, AUM Rs 2 lakh cr crossed). CMP 366.95, SL 358 (-3% from entry; gap to CMP ~2.4%). Fundamentals strong, MOSL TP 325-raised-to-broader-buy. Holding, SL intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.1%, CMP 826.60 post Q4 (+5.36% today). Trailing SL from 815 → 818 (entry breakeven minus minor buffer). Gap to CMP ~1.04% (just above 1% floor). Q4 beat (PAT +18%, India volume +9% best-in-class FMCG). Riding to target 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.3%, CMP 3255, SL 3245 — very close to SL after intraday fade from 3315 high. Q4 beat (PAT +42%), strong April wholesales. Letting SL work — if stopped, accept the loss; thesis intact for re-entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1265.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9%, CMP 1278.30 post Q4 (+11% today). SL 1265 already at entry+6 (gap to CMP ~1.04%). Q4 beat (rev +30%, PAT +144% QoQ aided by tax benefit). No-op MODIFY values match stored — converting intent: HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, CMP 3010, SL 2950 (-2.5%). Defence shipbuilding +8.34% today after recent volatility. Q4 EBITDA margin 16.8% expansion. SL has room to absorb chop. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Essentially flat, CMP 806.40 after gapping up 10.34%. SL 780 (-3.2%). Record Q4 EBITDA margin 46.5%, AUM +21%. Letting it consolidate. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Pending OPEN MIS BUY 600x @ 133.50 placed 485m ago (~9:00 AM placement) — has not filled. Per ORDER HYGIENE rules, not stacking another order. Letting it expire at MIS auto-close. Not emitting MODIFY (not allowed on pending unfilled orders)."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1030.00, "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+46. Tightening further would breach 1% trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 119.00, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. SL has room."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1710.00, "reasoning": "SL at 1710 = breakeven+10. Gap to CMP at 1% floor."},
    {"symbol": "BANDHANBNK", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 206.00, "reasoning": "SL very close — letting discipline work. Will not loosen."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4600.00, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+25. Q4 May 14 catalyst pending."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 6960.00, "reasoning": "SL at entry+60, gap ~0.9% — at floor; not tighter."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 825.00, "reasoning": "Q4 pending; SL absorbs disappointment."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 358.00, "reasoning": "Stock +6% today; SL has 2.4% room."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 818.00, "reasoning": "Trailing SL marginally above entry post Q4 beat."},
    {"symbol": "M&M", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3245.00, "reasoning": "Near SL — let it work."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1265.00, "reasoning": "SL at entry+6; floor-respecting."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2950.00, "reasoning": "SL has 2.5% room for defence-sector volatility."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 780.00, "reasoning": "Post-gap consolidation; SL has 3% room."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TITAGARH/CAMS/COFORGE/M&M all gapped sharply on Q4 results — momentum visible but I already have positions in all four. SUMICHEM Q4 was bearish (revenue -11.5% YoY, OP -21% YoY) — pass despite intraday spike. GRSE already held, no add. AUROPHARMA/WOCKPHARMA/AJANTPHARM/BIOCON/LAURUSLABS — pharma sector is leading (+2.26%) but I'd need cleaner setup to add new pharma exposure; current portfolio already diversified. PNB and CHOLAHLDNG — interesting but no compelling edge today. HFCL pending MIS order will likely lapse.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 67% deployed with 13 CNC positions — well diversified across HFC, gold, ports, banking, defence (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH = 3 names ~15% of capital, watch defence cluster), specialty chem (NAVINFLUOR), auto (M&M), FMCG (MARICO), IT (COFORGE), financial services (CAMS+ABCAPITAL+PNBHOUSING). Net unrealized +0.5% across positions. Today's priority is risk management — most positions are within 1-2% of entry, several SLs are appropriately tight. No new entries needed; the book is doing its job. Defence cluster (HAL + GRSE + TITAGARH) at ~15% — at the cluster cap, do not add a 4th defence name."
}
